---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#15: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture VIII`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **15**  | 51 | 23/03/2026 | - Sprint#15: ApartmentPredictor  Full-Architecture VIII </br></br>  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins </br></br> - **Queries**: JPQL, Criteria API, native</br></br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Component for Filter  | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxx){.external target='_blank'}  |
|   | 52 | 24/03/2026 | - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins </br></br> - **Queries**: JPQL, Criteria API, native</br></br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2)  Component for Filter  </br> (3) PageMap: `leafletjs`| - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxx){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [leafletjs](https://leafletjs.com/){.external target='_blank'} |
|   |    | | |
|   | 53 | 26/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins</br>  </br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) Filter | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxx){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 54 | 27/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins</br>  </br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) Filter | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxx){.external target='_blank'} |
: Backlog Sprint#14 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
